title: Head of Asia Trade and Working Capital Operations - Executive Director
description:
Join JPMorgan's Trade & Working Capital Operations team as the Regional Lead. You’ll lead operations managers and influence a team of professionals, driving continuous improvement and risk mitigation. Enhance your leadership skills while contributing to key initiatives and collaborating with cross-functional teams.

As the Head of Asia Trade & Working Capital Operations within JPMorgan's Payments business, you will oversee the Core & Structured Trade processes, ensuring transactions are executed efficiently, timely, and accurately, while fostering a proactive risk and control culture. You will collaborate with global teams to enhance client satisfaction and lead continuous improvement initiatives. With the responsibility of managing a team of 50 employees across Asia branches and influencing a global team of approximately150 professionals, your role encompasses strategy development, governance, and collaboration with various departments to ensure high-quality delivery and an exceptional client experience.

Job Responsibilities:

• Lead the Asia Trade & Working Capital Operations team, ensuring effective oversight of processes and controls.

• Cultivate a proactive risk and control culture with proven evaluation strategies.

• Ensure quality output to meet all Key Performance Indicators for client satisfaction.

• Foster an inclusive culture to attract, develop, and retain diverse talent.

• Promote continuous learning and development within the team.

• Partner with colleagues across the firm to drive consistent operational practices.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure strong focus on quality and delivery.

• Prepare and present reports and recommendations to senior management.

• Drive continuous improvement initiatives and stay current with sanctions and regulatory changes.

• Lead interactions with audit and compliance teams.

Required Qualifications, Capabilities, and Skills:

• Bachelor’s degree in finance or a related field.

• Minimum 10 years of experience within the Financial Services Industry.

• Knowledge of Trade Finance, including Commercial and Standby Letters of Credit.

• Strong leadership and team management skills with proven experience leading global functions.

• Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex data.

• Excellent communication skills, capable of conveying complex information clearly.

• Demonstrated experience in risk management and developing control frameworks.

• Detail-oriented with a commitment to accuracy and quality.

• Self-starter, with the ability to execute in a fast-paced environment.

Preferred Qualifications, Capabilities, and Skills:

• Experience in managing operations and/or risk & controls.

• Experience in data management initiatives.

• Familiarity with Sanctions and Regulatory changes impacting Trade Finance.

To apply for this position, please use the following URL:

https://ars2.equest.com/?response_id=99d02984b30bd7173221dfcab93d13fb

postedCompany.description:
About J.P. Morgan

J.P. Morgan has been a leader in helping companies grow and markets develop throughout our history. We collaborate across the globe to deliver the solutions and advice to meet our clients’ needs, anywhere in the world.  We operate in 100 countries and hold global leadership positions across our businesses. When you join J.P. Morgan you’ll be: working with a team committed to being the best; earning the trust of our clients; demanding excellence of yourself.

What makes this the best place to build your career? Because we’ll make the most of all your talents, not just your technical skills. We’ll challenge you, but we’ll also make being here as stimulating and diverse as your life is. You’ll be given the tools, training and support needed to help us keep doing first-class business in a first-class way, as we have for over 200 years. Our global platform allows you to have more mobility, choices and opportunities to contribute than you ever imagined. It all adds up to the perfect opportunity to take your career further with us.
postedCompany.name: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
